findings.summary: Current local HEAD and live remote branch identity could not be independently confirmed.
findings.evidence: Existing exact-commit evidence reports clean local HEAD, tracking ref, and live origin bos/issue-51 at 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36, but the current read-only git check failed before execution because the sandbox launcher could not find bubblewrap. The requested affirmative current confirmation is therefore missing.

findings.summary: Existing exact-commit implementation and validation evidence is affirmative.
findings.evidence: Confirmed EvidenceReports bind commit 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36 to complete 8-file diff inspection and passing 363-test, 100.00% coverage, strict Credo, Dialyzer, formatting, and diff-hygiene checks. No source-quality defect is identified by the available evidence.

summary: Inconclusive: exact-commit quality evidence is affirmative and no code-quality defect is identified, but the required current local HEAD and live remote bos/issue-51 identity could not be independently re-confirmed due an unavailable sandbox command runtime.
